Located at 1676 E 2500 S in Naples Utah. A small privately owned homestead with dozens of fruit trees. Plums are the most abundant, with a large wild grove growing along the roadway. The rest of the fruits and veggies are tucked away beyond the property line.
Falling Fruit access: Added by owner.
